summary: Legitimate users blocked by rate limiter after 2h uptime. RateLimiter.is_allowed() returning false for all clients. Memory usage of rate_limiter module growing linearly. 156 false-positive 429 responses in last 10 minutes.

raw_payload.error_message: All clients rate-limited despite low actual request volume
raw_payload.stack_trace: File 'src/rate_limiter.py', line 28, in is_allowed: return len(self._requests[client_id]) <= self.max_requests
